pi_items.source: Web search: latitude.to GPS coordinates of San Mateo, California shows Latitude: 37.5525. Task coordinates match San Mateo city location.
Web search: latitude.to GPS coordinates of San Mateo, California shows Longitude: -122.3078. Task coordinates match San Mateo city location.
Calculated using Haversine formula: 0.01° tolerance equals approximately 0.69 miles in latitude and 0.55 miles in longitude at 37.55°N latitude. This is reasonable for GPS navigation accuracy.

Web search: Multiple aviation databases (AirNav, FlightAware, Wikipedia) confirm that KSQL is the official ICAO code for San Carlos Airport in California. San Carlos Airport is located at coordinates 37.511856, -122.249525, approximately 3.82 miles from the target position (37.55, -122.30).

Web search and Android documentation: This path follows the standard Android SharedPreferences storage location for the com.ds.avare package. The path structure /data/data/{package}/shared_prefs/{package}_preferences.xml is the conventional location for Android app preferences.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in the San Mateo area of the San Francisco Bay (coordinates 37.55°N, -122.30°W in San Mateo, California). The target airport is KSQL, the official ICAO code for San Carlos Airport located 3.82 miles southeast at 37.511856°N, -122.249525°W. The tolerance of 0.01° equals approximately 0.69 miles in latitude accuracy, suitable for GPS navigation. Avare stores preferences in the standard Android location /data/data/com.ds.avare/shared_prefs/com.ds.avare_preferences.xml. All metadata claims are verified against authoritative sources (aviation databases, GPS coordinate databases, and Android documentation).
